==About==
===Format===
* '''Semi Finals''' ''(Online)'' : ''October 17th - 22nd
** 24 teams.
** 8 Grand Finalist teams.
** 12 invited teams.
** 4 teams from ''Quarter Finals.
** 6 matchdays.
** 36 matches (6 each day).
** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 8 teams}} other than ''Grand Finalists'' qualify for the ''Grand Finals.

* '''Grand Finals''' ''(Offline)'' : ''November 7th - 8th
** 16 teams.
** 8 invited teams.
** 8 teams from Semi Finals.
** 2 Matchdays.
** 14 matches (7 each day).
